meta.name: IO MLflow Sink
meta.description: Routes xOpat data into MLflow experiments and runs through the IO pipeline. Admin-routable via ENV.client.io.bindings; the record layout is chosen from named templates or a custom mapper. The MLflow credential is held server-side by a proxy alias and never reaches the client.

template.custom: A custom mapper registered at runtime.

error.auth: MLflow rejected the credential. Check the server-side token's validity and the proxy's auth verifier chain.
error.notFound: The MLflow experiment or run was not found. Check the experiment template and the proxy's upstream URL.
error.http: MLflow could not be reached. Check that the server proxy alias is configured and the MLflow host is up.
error.experimentDenied: Writing to the MLflow experiment "{{experiment}}" is not permitted by this deployment.
error.mapperMissing: No MLflow record template named "{{name}}" exists.
error.mapperThrew: The MLflow record template "{{name}}" failed on this record.
error.mapperShape: The MLflow record template "{{name}}" produced an unusable result.
error.noArtifacts: This MLflow template writes artifacts, but no artifacts adapter is configured for the sink.
